top_categories.workout_context: 754 miles. Your legs will beg to quit after 120. This trains the power output you need from mile 130 onward.
At Midnight Sun Randonnée, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 754 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
46,900ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Midnight Sun Randonnée's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
754 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
62ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
46,900ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 46,900ft of climbing on mountain passes does to your power file on race day.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Midnight Sun Randonnée. Train it until it feels boring.
Low-cadence force work for 46,900ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Midnight Sun Randonnée's mountain passes forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 754 miles.

race_overlay.nutrition: Ultra-distance fueling for 754 miles: 80–100g carbs/hour from mile 1 — don’t wait until you’re hungry. Practice your exact race-day nutrition in every long training ride. Carry backup calories. 754 miles burns 8,000–12,000+ calories — you cannot replace them all, but you must try.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Midnight Sun Randonnée. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Over Under, and Endurance to prepare you for 754 miles of mountain passes in Brännland Inn near Umeå, Sweden to Scandic Plaza hotel in Umeå (loop into Norway to Mo i Rana and Norwegian Sea fjords).
